channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [UTKARSHBNK] Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Receives '62 - Strong' ESG Score
item.description:
Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd has been assigned an ESG score of '62 - Strong' by ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited on April 24, 2026. The rating is based on publicly available information and was voluntarily assigned. The disclosure is available on the bank's website.

  • Utkarsh Small Finance Bank receives an ESG score of '62 - Strong'.
  • ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited assigned the score.
  • The ESG score is based on publicly available information.
  • The rating was assigned on April 24, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: ESG

item.title: [CTLLAB] Clinitech Lab Enters MoU with MD Plus Multispeciality Clinic
item.description:
Clinitech Laboratory Limited has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) dated April 25, 2026, with M/s. MD Plus Multispeciality Clinic. The MOU involves operating a pathology lab and handling a pickup point for pathology and full referral radiology services by Clinitech.

  • Clinitech Lab signs MOU with MD Plus Multispeciality Clinic.
  • The MOU is effective as of April 25, 2026.
  • Clinitech will operate a pathology lab under the agreement.
  • The company will handle pathology pickup and radiology referral services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Clinitech Laboratory Ltd | Category: MoU

item.title: [TRITON] HOMRE Ltd CIN Changed to L35106DL1990PLC039989
item.description:
HOMRE Ltd's Corporate Identification Number (CIN) has been updated to L35106DL1990PLC039989, consequent to the updation of the National Industrial Classification (NIC) Code, as recorded by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA). The change was approved by the shareholders and duly recorded by the Registrar of Companies, NCT of Delhi & Haryana. The updated MCA Master Data reflecting the revised CIN is enclosed in the filing.

  • HOMRE Ltd's CIN changed due to NIC Code update.
  • New CIN is L35106DL1990PLC039989.
  • Change approved by shareholders and recorded by Registrar of Companies.
  • Updated MCA Master Data reflects the revised CIN.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRITON CORP.LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [TECHIN] Techindia Nirman Revises Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Techindia Nirman Ltd has revised its financial results (Annexure 1) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, initially submitted on April 23, 2026. Key figures from the standalone audited results include total income of ₹0.34 for the year ended March 31, 2026, and a net loss of ₹62.15. The board was reinstated by NCLAT on December 15, 2025, but its composition is not fully compliant with SEBI (LODR) Regulations. The company is addressing delays in real estate development advances and R&D laboratory setup due to resource constraints.

  • Techindia Nirman revised its FY26 financial results initially submitted on April 23, 2026.
  • Total income for the year ended March 31, 2026, stood at ₹0.34.
  • The company reported a net loss of ₹62.15 for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Board reinstatement occurred on December 15, 2025, but SEBI (LODR) compliance is pending.
  • Delays in real estate and R&D advances are being addressed post-board reinstatement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TECHINDIA NIRMAN LIMITED | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KRETTOSYS] Kretto Syscon CFO Kush Bhadreshbhai Shah Resigns
item.description:
Kretto Syscon Ltd has announced the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer, Kush Bhadreshbhai Shah, effective April 25, 2026. Shah cited personal reasons for his departure and confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation. The company has provided details of the cessation as per SEBI regulations.

  • Kush Bhadreshbhai Shah resigned as CFO of Kretto Syscon Ltd.
  • Resignation is effective from April 25, 2026.
  • Personal reasons cited for the resignation.
  • No material reasons other than personal reasons were stated in the resignation letter.
  • Company complied with SEBI regulations regarding the disclosure of the cessation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kretto Syscon Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SMCGLOBAL] SMC Global Board Meeting on May 2, 2026 to Consider Dividend
item.description:
SMC Global Securities Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 2, 2026, to consider and approve the annual audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider a proposal for the recommendation of a final dividend on the company's equity shares for the financial year 2025-26. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • SMC Global's board to meet on May 2, 2026, to approve FY26 financial results.
  • Board will consider recommending a final dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results.
  • Meeting is pursuant to SEBI Listing Regulations 29(1) and 50(1).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SMC Global Securities Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AXISBANK] Axis Bank: Directors Re-appointed
item.description:
Axis Bank Ltd. announces the re-appointment of N. S. Vishwanathan as an Independent Director for a second term of four years, effective from May 30, 2027, to May 29, 2031, and as a Non-Executive (Part-time) Chairman for three years, effective from October 27, 2026, to October 26, 2029. Additionally, P. N. Prasad is re-appointed as an Independent Director for a second term of four years, effective from October 20, 2026, to October 19, 2030. These appointments are subject to member and regulatory approvals.

  • N. S. Vishwanathan re-appointed as Independent Director and Non-Executive Chairman.
  • P. N. Prasad re-appointed as Independent Director.
  • Re-appointments subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.
  • Terms for Vishwanathan and Prasad's re-appointments specified.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AXIS BANK LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [AXISBANK] Axis Bank to Hold AGM on July 31, 2026; Sets Record Date
item.description:
Axis Bank Ltd has announced that its 32nd Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held on July 31, 2026, via video conference. The Board of Directors approved the AGM during its meeting on April 25, 2026. The record date for the payment of the final dividend has been fixed as July 10, 2026. The board meeting commenced at 9:00 am (IST) and concluded at 4:30 pm (IST).

  • Axis Bank's 32nd AGM scheduled for July 31, 2026, via video conference.
  • Record date for dividend payment is set as July 10, 2026.
  • Board approved the AGM during its meeting on April 25, 2026.
  • Meeting held as per Regulation 30 and 42 of SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AXIS BANK LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [MIC] MIC Electronics FY26: Standalone Loss ₹18.34 Lakhs
item.description:
MIC Electronics Ltd declared audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved both standalone and consolidated financial results. The statutory auditors, M/s. Bhavani & Co., issued an 'Unmodified Opinion' on the audited financial results. Standalone results show a loss of ₹18.34 lakhs for the period.

  • MIC Electronics reports standalone loss of ₹18.34 lakhs for the period ended March 31, 2026.
  • Auditors issued an 'Unmodified Opinion' on the standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Standalone revenue from operations stood at ₹5079.49 lakhs for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • The Board approved both standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MIC ELECTRONICS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BANSALWIRE] Bansal Wire: Trading Window Closed Until May 1, 2026
item.description:
Bansal Wire Industries Limited has announced that the trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares will remain closed until Friday, May 01, 2026. This closure is in anticipation of the Board of Directors meeting scheduled for Wednesday, April 29, 2026, where the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, will be considered and approved. The announcement is a continuation of the earlier intimation dated March 25, 2026, and is in accordance with the company's code of conduct for regulating trading by designated persons.

  • Trading window for Bansal Wire Industries closed until May 1, 2026.
  • Board meeting on April 29, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Closure aligns with the company's code of conduct for designated persons.
  • Announcement follows earlier intimation dated March 25, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bansal Wire Industries Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance
